issue_summary: Created "NullArgumentException" (subclass of "MathIllegalArgumentException"). Changed all occurrences of "createIllegalArgumentException" (in "MathRuntime") to throw the new exception whenever a "null" is not allowed. Added a few checks for null in "BigFraction.java". Simplified "LocalizedFormats" enum. Changed "ZeroNotAllowedException" to "ZeroException".
javadoc_before: /** * Modify the realFormat. * @param realFormat The new realFormat value. * @throws IllegalArgumentException if realFormat is * null. */
javadoc_after:
/**
     * Modify the realFormat.
     * @param realFormat The new realFormat value.
     * @throws NullArgumentException if {@code realFormat} is {@code null}.
     */
